# Retire verified-no-lane from validateLaneStateTerminal ‚Üí driving-only

## Context

#13618 **AC2**, graduated via #13621‚Üí#13623 (¬ßno_hold_state operationalization). AC1 (the `¬ßno_hold_state` / `L3` stance) shipped in #13620 (merged). This retires the survey-idle-terminal so the validator's terminals align with the merged stance.

**The contradiction this resolves** (surfaced in my #13621 ¬ß5.2 STEP_BACK): `L3`'s premise (`AGENTS.md:37`) already brands `verified-no-lane` a *manufactured idle* ‚Äî yet `validateLaneStateTerminal` still **certifies it** as a valid terminal (`LANE_CONTINUATIONS` + Rule 4). Stance and validator contradict. AC2 is **correctness**, not merely net-reduction.

## The Problem

Under ¬ßno_hold_state ("high-value work is infinite; we never run out"), `verified-no-lane` ‚Äî a full-backlog survey claiming no claimable lane ‚Äî is ~never honestly true; it's the survey-flavored manufactured-idle the firewall rejects. The validator should admit only **driving** continuations.

## The Architectural Reality

- `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs` ‚Äî pure validator; `LANE_CONTINUATIONS` (line 19) + Rule 4 (86-93, the verified-no-lane backlog-survey rule) + the `backlogSurvey` param (46/55) + the header comment (line 8).
- `parseLaneState.mjs` ‚Äî continuation-set-**agnostic** by design (its JSDoc: "a change to the valid continuation set never touches the parser"); but it normalizes `backlogSurvey` (line 61), which is orphaned once Rule 4 is gone.
- Consumers (read-only via the validator): `laneStateStopHook.mjs` (#13589, Claude) + `codex-lane-state-stop.mjs` (#13625, Codex) ‚Äî both delegate to the shared validator, so the retirement propagates to both hooks automatically (no per-harness fork).

## The Fix

Drop `verified-no-lane` ‚Üí validator terminals = the 3 **driving** continuations (`active-lane` / `next-lane` / `blocker-routed`):
- `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs`: remove from `LANE_CONTINUATIONS`; delete Rule 4; remove the `backlogSurvey` param/destructure + its JSDoc `@param`; update the header comment + the Rule-list JSDoc.
- `parseLaneState.mjs`: drop the orphaned `backlogSurvey` from the normalized descriptor (line 61) + its JSDoc (stays continuation-agnostic).
- Specs (remove/repoint the `verified-no-lane`/Rule-4/`backlogSurvey` cases): `validateLaneStateTerminal.spec.mjs`, `parseLaneState.spec.mjs`, `laneStateStopHook.spec.mjs`, `codexLaneStateStopHook.spec.mjs` (#13625, now in dev ‚Äî its `verified-no-lane` invalid-example asserts the old Rule-4 message ‚Üí repoint to a still-invalid example).

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `LANE_CONTINUATIONS` enum | `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs` + `¬ßno_hold_state` (`L3`) | drop `verified-no-lane` ‚Üí `['active-lane','next-lane','blocker-routed']` | an emitted `verified-no-lane` now fails as "Unknown laneContinuation" | `post-review-pickup-workflow.md` | `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs:19`; `AGENTS.md:37` (L3 brands it manufactured-idle) |
| Rule 4 (verified-no-lane survey rule) | `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs` | removed | n/a (rule gone) | ‚Äî | `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs:86-93` |
| `backlogSurvey` descriptor field | `parseLaneState.mjs` + validator | removed (orphaned by Rule-4 removal) | parser drops it from the normalized descriptor; harmless if an agent still emits it | ‚Äî | `parseLaneState.mjs:61`; `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs:46,55` |

## Decision Record

Optional ‚Äî the #13616‚Üí#13618‚Üí#13623 graduation is the record; aligns-with the merged `¬ßno_hold_state` stance (#13620); no ADR (firewall-operationalization).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `verified-no-lane` removed from `LANE_CONTINUATIONS`; validator terminals = the 3 driving continuations.
- [ ] Rule 4 + the `backlogSurvey` param/JSDoc removed from `validateLaneStateTerminal.mjs`; header comment + Rule-list JSDoc updated.
- [ ] `parseLaneState.mjs` drops the orphaned `backlogSurvey` (stays continuation-agnostic).
- [ ] All 4 specs green with the `verified-no-lane`/Rule-4/`backlogSurvey` cases removed or repointed (incl. the merged #13625 Codex spec).
- [ ] Net byte-reduction.

## Out of Scope

- **AGENTS.md `L3` teeth-test + the `verified-no-lane` token trim + atlas** ‚Äî the paired **#13623 Axis-1** slice (separate PR; byte-cap-coupled). AC2 touches no AGENTS.md.
- **`laneStateStopHook.mjs` reminder-content injection** ‚Äî @neo-opus-grace's #13623 Axis-2 slice (she owns the hook file; I own only the `verified-no-lane` test-block in its spec ‚Äî different blocks, coordinated).
- **Archive/historical refs** (`issue-10777`, `discussion-12627`/`-12630`) ‚Äî NOT retro-edited (they record what was true then).
